title: Supervisor can complete the full inspection workflow
description: A signed-in supervisor can move through all five inspection steps and submit a completed inspection successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid plant ID
Capture or upload a plant photo
Verify the submission complete state is displayed
Verify the inspection was recorded successfully

title: Supervisor can sign in and reach the dashboard
description: A supervisor can authenticate from the splash page and land on the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify protected supervisor content is visible

title: Unauthenticated users are redirected away from the dashboard
description: A visitor who opens the dashboard without signing in is taken back to the splash page.

steps.description: Verify the splash page is displayed
Verify access to protected dashboard content is blocked

title: Unauthenticated users are redirected away from inspection entry
description: A visitor who opens the inspection flow without signing in is taken back to the splash page.

steps.description: Verify the splash page is displayed
Verify access to the inspection flow is blocked

title: Offline inspection is saved locally when submitted without connectivity
description: A signed-in supervisor can complete an inspection offline and save it locally for later synchronization.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid plant ID
Capture or upload a plant photo
Verify the inspection is saved locally
Verify an offline save confirmation is visible

title: Supervisor can use dashboard sync controls to process queued records
description: A signed-in supervisor can open dashboard sync controls, trigger synchronization, and see pending records clear after processing.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the sync queue from the dashboard
Verify updated sync status is visible

title: Trigger manual sync from the profile page
description: A supervisor can trigger synchronization from the profile page and see the sync status update afterward.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open the profile page
Verify pending records are no longer shown

title: Supervisor can use profile sync controls to process pending records
description: A signed-in supervisor can open profile sync controls, trigger synchronization, and see pending records processed after connectivity returns.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the sync controls show an updated state

title: Supervisor can review history and see sync status for past inspections
description: A signed-in supervisor can open history and review previously logged inspections with their sync status.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify sync status information is visible

title: Review the inspection history list
description: A supervisor can open the inspection history page and see previously logged inspections with their sync status.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open inspection history
Verify a list of inspection records is displayed
Verify sync status information is displayed for the records

title: Open a past inspection and review its stored details
description: A supervisor can open a previously logged inspection from history and view the saved inspection details and sync state.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open inspection history
Click a previously logged inspection record
Verify the inspection detail view is displayed
Verify the inspection's stored details and sync status are displayed

title: View the supervisor profile page
description: A supervisor can open the profile page and review profile information and sync-related settings.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open the profile page

title: Supervisor can view the plantation digital twin
description: A signed-in supervisor can open the digital twin page and view the plantation map layout.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the plantation map is displayed
Verify the digital twin content is visible

title: View the plantation digital twin map
description: An authenticated user can open the digital twin page and see the plantation map layout for visual field reference.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open the digital twin map
Verify the plantation map is displayed
Verify field layout information is displayed

title: Return to the dashboard from the profile page
description: A supervisor can use the profile page navigation to return to the dashboard and continue monitoring the app.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open the profile page
Click the link to return to the dashboard

title: Inspect the map layout by panning
description: An authenticated user can interact with the digital twin map to inspect different plantation areas.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open the digital twin map
Pan the map to inspect another area
Verify the map remains visible after interaction
Verify plantation layout content is still displayed

title: Supervisor cannot proceed with an invalid plant ID
description: A signed-in supervisor who enters an invalid plant ID on step 1 remains on step 1 and sees validation blocking progress.

steps.description: Fill in the supervisor email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in an invalid plant ID
Verify a plant ID validation error is visible

title: See an empty history state when no inspections exist
description: A supervisor can open inspection history and see an empty state when no inspection records have been logged.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Click the link to open inspection history
Verify an empty state message is displayed
